polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?
Will Bitcoin dip to $62,500 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words. Summarize overall market sentiment based on data: two prediction markets: Ethereum dip to $1500 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 38% (vol $117,248). Bitcoin dip to $62,500 in July: Yes 36% (vol $81,483). So probability of dip is less than 50% for both, implying market thinks unlikely to dip, thus bullish sentiment. Provide reasons: low probability of dip, volumes indicate interest. Must be one paragraph, start with "Bullish:" then reasons. Max 80 words. Let's craft ~50 words.

"Bullish: Prediction markets show only a 38% chance Ethereum falls to $1,500 by end‑2026 and a 36% chance Bitcoin drops to $62,500 in July, both below 50%, indicating traders expect prices to stay above those levels; the substantial volumes ($117k and $81k) reinforce confidence in continued upside."
